overview: Prep Tracker by Yash is a premium study and gym tracking app with admin and user roles. Features include a Study Timer, Syllabus Tracker with revision tracking, rich-text Notes with PDF support, and a Gym Attendance Tracker — all wrapped in a modern, responsive design that adapts between mobile and desktop.
features: Study Timer with circular progress and session history
Syllabus Tracker with revision targets and progress
Rich-text Notes with color tags and pinning
Gym Attendance Calendar with streak tracking
Admin password change and logo customization
Responsive layout: sidebar on desktop, bottom nav on mobile
Premium Navy/Royal Blue/Cyan design theme with smooth animations
